title: bridge-matrix config does not validate bot_localpart is non-empty
description: bridge-matrix/src/config.rs validate() checks as_token and hs_token for emptiness but does not check bot_localpart. An empty bot_localpart causes is_bot_sender() to construct the MXID '@:domain' which no real Matrix user would have, so echo suppression silently stops working rather than the more dangerous case of treating all events as bot messages. Trivial fix: add 'if self.bot_localpart.is_empty() { bail\!(...)' to validate().
